function solve(nums) {
    const N = nums.length;
    let totalGoodSubarrays = 0;

    for (let l = 0; l < N; l++) {
        const X = nums[l];

        // 1. Find L (Left boundary)
        let L = l;
        // Check elements to the left of l
        for (let i = l - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            // Check if nums[i] is a submask of X: (nums[i] | X) === X
            if ((nums[i] | X) === X) {
                L = i;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }

        // 2. Find R (Right boundary)
        let R = l;
        // Check elements to the right of l
        for (let j = l + 1; j < N; j++) {
            // Check if nums[j] is a submask of X
            if ((nums[j] | X) === X) {
                R = j;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }

        // 3. Count contributions
        // We need i such that L <= i <= l, and j such that l <= j <= R.
        // The number of choices for i is (l - L + 1).
        // The number of choices for j is (R - l + 1).
        
        const count_i = l - L + 1;
        const count_j = R - l + 1;
        
        // All these subarrays [i, j] have OR sum X = nums[l], and nums[l] is in the subarray.
        totalGoodSubarrays += count_i * count_j;
    }

    return totalGoodSubarrays;
}
